主要结论：
- overall_result: 无实质突破。3个版本全部无效：v001交易数13过低，v002交易数19略低且PF仅0.36，v003交易数172严重超标。所有版本均亏损且固定止损吞噬ROI收益。
- best_candidate: nearest_candidate MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003：训练50笔交易在目标范围内，验证feb_2026盈利PF=1.47，但训练PF=0.62亏损，止损亏损19.6远超ROI收益12.1。这是当前最接近可用的参考基线。
- 固定止损亏损吞噬ROI收益：所有版本stop_loss_profit_abs远大于roi_profit_abs
- 交易数控制失败：v001过度过滤导致13笔，v003过度放宽导致172笔
- 入场质量低：高winrate但单笔止损亏损过大，说明入场时机不精准导致深度回撤触发止损
下一轮建议：
- preferred_parent: nearest_candidate (MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_064426_v003)，因其交易数50在目标范围内且有验证期盈利记录
- tighten_stoploss
- add_volatility_filter
- pair_specific_entry_threshold

为什么仍未成为 best：未通过有效性约束或综合得分不足。

    "下一轮建议": [
      "不要扩大交易数",

    ]

你是策略顾问模型。只输出 mutation_spec JSON，不要输出 Python 代码。建议 strategy_name=MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v001
goal={"min_profit_total_pct": 0, "max_drawdown_pct": 3, "min_profit_factor": 0.56, "min_trades": 20, "max_trades": 60, "prefer_exit_signal": false, "max_stoploss_loss_usdt": 15, "ideal_min_trades": 25, "ideal_max_trades": 45}
baseline={"profit_total_abs": -7.43, "profit_total_pct": -0.74, "profit_factor": 0.63, "max_drawdown_pct": 1.45, "total_trades": 47}
recent_failed=当前最佳基准：
- profit_total_pct=-0.74
- profit_factor=0.6300
- max_drawdown_pct=1.45
- total_trades=47
最近失败策略摘要：
- v004：交易数1，收益率0.00%，PF0.00，回撤0.00%，失败=Profit factor 低于 baseline，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v005：交易数5，收益率-0.33%，PF0.07，回撤0.33%，失败=Profit factor 低于 baseline；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v001：交易数13，收益率-0.07%，PF0.76，回撤0.27%，失败=固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v002：交易数19，收益率-0.44%，PF0.36，回撤0.45%，失败=Profit factor 低于 baseline；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v003：交易数172，收益率-2.95%，PF0.51，回撤3.42%，失败=训练区间亏损超过 baseline；Profit factor 低于 baseline；最大回撤超过目标；交易数超过目标上限；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。；high_frequency_failure：交易数超过 max_trades * 2，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
禁止重复：
- 不要生成与失败策略相同的 stoploss / ROI / trailing_stop 组合
- 不要继续生成 300+ 交易的高频策略
- 不要继续宽松 RSI/EMA/momentum 高频结构
- 不要为了满足 min_trades 而过度放宽入场
- 优先减少 stop_loss 损失和验证区间回撤
last_failure=无
必须只选择一个 mutation_type，允许值：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter,adjust_roi,adjust_stoploss,reduce_trade_frequency,disable_or_adjust_trailing,tighten_volume_filter,cooldown_or_protection。
JSON 必须包含: mutation_type,reason,expected_effect,changes,do_not_change。
硬约束：本轮训练区间总交易数目标是 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 会直接跳过验证；16~19 会继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best，超过 90 会直接跳过验证。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
重点：减少固定止损吞噬 ROI，不是增加交易数量。禁止/不推荐：increase_trade_frequency,loosen_entry,enable_trailing,replace_stoploss_with_trailing,adjust_stoploss_only,widen_stoploss。优先：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter。trailing 规则：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。

========== 策略结构探索模式 ==========
当前不是微调模式，而是结构探索模式。不要只围绕 current best 做小步改动；请读取 historical_best/nearest/memory 的经验，但允许生成不同结构的策略族。
本轮 mutation_spec 必须包含 strategy_family 字段，且值必须严格等于 planned_strategy_family。
planned_strategy_family=trend_following
允许的 strategy_family=["trend_following", "pullback_reversal", "breakout_momentum", "low_volatility_mean_reversion", "strict_risk_filter"]
允许重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑。
必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 策略格式、现货 long-only、不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不外部 API、use_exit_signal=False 等风控安全边界。
探索模式交易数硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20，ideal_min_trades=25，ideal_max_trades=45，max_trades=60。任何 strategy_family 生成的入场逻辑都必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止生成明显高频策略；如果预计交易数会超过 60，不要输出该方案。
如果当前 family 统计中 pending_low_trade_profitable_near_miss=true 或 last_low_trade_near_miss 非空，下一轮必须优先轻微放宽该 near-miss 的入场条件，把交易数提升到 20~25，不要直接跳到完全不同 family。
breakout_momentum 和 strict_risk_filter 对频率错误更敏感：如果它们曾明显超出 max_trades，必须显著收紧触发事件、冷却、成交量/趋势过滤，避免再次高频。
trailing 限制：不要建议 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
避免连续生成同类策略；每个 family 至少尝试一次；明显连续亏损或连续 high_frequency_failure 的 family 会被降低权重或本 run 禁选。
请在 reason 中说明该 family 的结构假设、从历史 best 中借鉴了什么、与小步微调有何不同。

========== 用户额外策略顾问规则 ==========
1. 当前固定使用 BTC/USDT、OP/USDT、SOL/USDT、BNB/USDT、DOGE/USDT 五个交易对。
2. 不要简单用 trailing 替代 fixed stoploss。trailing 只能在已有盈利后启用，不能让移动止损成为主要亏损来源。
3. 当前核心目标是减少低质量入场和亏损单数量，不是盲目提高交易频率。
4. 如果某个 family 连续产生高频亏损，应降低该 family 权重。
5. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。

当前启用策略结构探索模式，不是微调模式。请生成 strategy_family=trend_following 的新结构 challenger；可以重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑，但必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 格式和风控安全边界。，只输出 Python 代码。类名必须为 MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v001，继承 IStrategy，timeframe='5m'，并实现 populate_indicators/populate_entry_trend/populate_exit_trend。
champion_strategy_code=
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_014140_v001(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.025,
        "15": 0.018,
        "35": 0.012,
        "60": 0.007,
        "120": 0.004,
    }

    stoploss = -0.035

    trailing_stop = False
    # trailing_stop_positive = 0.008
    # trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.014
    # trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        # New indicator: EMA 20 slope (percentage change over 3 candles)
        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        # New indicators required by mutation_spec
        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 1.0) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &      # Added: price above EMA200
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])       # Added: EMA50 above EMA200
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 1.05)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &                           # Changed from 28 to 22 per mutation spec
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &                            # Changed from 17 to 18 per mutation spec
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 0.9) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

mutation_spec={"strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v001", "strategy_family": "trend_following", "mutation_type": "add_entry_filter", "reason": "趋势跟踪族首次尝试。借鉴 historical_best (run_20260531_014140_v001) 的 MACD 交叉动量核心逻辑（36笔交易、86%胜率），但其5笔止损亏损9.48吞噬了ROI收益8.84。根本原因是入场时未确认趋势强度，导致在震荡区间入场后深度回撤触发止损。本轮结构假设：在 MACD 金叉基础上叠加 ADX 趋势强度过滤（ADX>20）和 EMA200 方向过滤（价格在 EMA200 尚无失败记录，从结构探索角度出发设计全新入场逻辑。"}
当前失败摘要=无
硬性约束：
1) 当前是结构探索模式：允许不局限于 champion 小步改动，但必须吸收历史经验，避免重复已失败结构。
2) 策略必须在训练区间产生合理交易，严禁生成完全无交易策略。
2) 训练区间总交易数目标为 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 笔直接跳过验证；16~19 笔继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best；超过 90 直接跳过验证。
3) 禁止连续状态型宽松入场；优先 crossed_above/crossed_below 事件触发；每个策略最多 1~2 个 entry_tag。
4) 不允许多个 OR 条件堆叠造成高频；不允许为了增加交易数而放宽入场。
3) 优先保证训练区间有稳定交易，不要把过滤条件堆得过严。
4) 如果上一轮 total_trades=0，本轮必须大幅放宽入场条件，并确保训练区间产生交易。
5) 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
6) use_exit_signal 必须为 False，不允许改为 True。
7) 仅现货 long only：不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不无限补仓，不允许 conditions_short。
8) 不调用外部 API，不读取手动交易记录。
9) 禁止使用过强过滤的全 AND 叠加（如 close>ema200_1h、rsi_1h>55、ema20>ema50>ema100、volume>rolling_mean*1.5 同时成立）。
10) 入场逻辑可更宽松，鼓励用 OR 组合：RSI 回调反弹 / EMA 短周期金叉 / 布林带下轨反弹 / MACD 转强 / 成交量不极低。
11) 不允许生成完全无交易策略，也不允许超过 90 笔训练交易。
11a) 探索模式额外硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20 / ideal_min_trades=25 / ideal_max_trades=45 / max_trades=60；入场逻辑必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止明显高频；如果预计超过 60 笔，不要实现该方案。
12) 目标不是追求 0 回撤，而是在足够交易数下综合表现优于 baseline。
13) trailing 限制：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；不要实现 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
最近失败策略共同原因通常不是没有盈利单，而是固定止损或 trailing_stop_loss 吃掉 ROI 收益。

- v001：交易数13，收益率-0.07%，PF0.76，回撤0.27%，失败=固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']

from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v001(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.013,
        "30": 0.008,
        "70": 0.005,
        "140": 0.003,
        "240": 0.001,
    }

    stoploss = -0.017

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.007
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.018
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 240

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 48,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 96,
                "trade_limit": 4,
                "stop_duration_candles": 36,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.008,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx_14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_hist"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_sma_50"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=50, min_periods=50).mean()

        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = bollinger["mid"]
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]

        dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)
        dataframe["ema20_slope_3"] = (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)
        dataframe["close_ema50_dist"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_50"]) / dataframe["ema_50"]

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        macd_cross = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd"], dataframe["macd_signal"])
        ema_reclaim = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_20"])

        base_trend_filter = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > 20) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 70) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] > -0.0012) &
            (dataframe["close_ema50_dist"] < 0.045)
        )

        secondary_trend_filter = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > 22) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 42) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 66) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 0.95) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
            (dataframe["macd_hist"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["ema20_slope_3"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["close_ema50_dist"] < 0.035)
        )

        if pair == "OP/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0025) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.020) &
                (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.012) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0025) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0020) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0020) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.016) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["adx_14"] > 23)
            )
        elif pair == "BTC/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"] * 0.995)
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.011) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])
            )
        elif pair == "BNB/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.015) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 68)
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.014) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 64) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.026) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 64) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.023) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 62) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
        else:
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.022) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = pair_filter

        primary_long = (
            macd_cross &
            base_trend_filter &
            pair_filter
        )

        secondary_long = (
            ema_reclaim &
            secondary_trend_filter &
            secondary_pair_filter
        )

        dataframe.loc[primary_long, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "trend_macd_adx_ema200",
        )

        dataframe.loc[secondary_long & (~primary_long), ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "trend_ema_reclaim_adx",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

v001 codegen.raw.txt
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_111202/v001/codegen.raw.txt
============================================================
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v001(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.013,
        "30": 0.008,
        "70": 0.005,
        "140": 0.003,
        "240": 0.001,
    }

    stoploss = -0.017

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.007
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.018
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 240

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 48,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 96,
                "trade_limit": 4,
                "stop_duration_candles": 36,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.008,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx_14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_hist"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_sma_50"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=50, min_periods=50).mean()

        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = bollinger["mid"]
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]

        dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)
        dataframe["ema20_slope_3"] = (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)
        dataframe["close_ema50_dist"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_50"]) / dataframe["ema_50"]

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        macd_cross = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd"], dataframe["macd_signal"])
        ema_reclaim = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_20"])

        base_trend_filter = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > 20) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 70) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] > -0.0012) &
            (dataframe["close_ema50_dist"] < 0.045)
        )

        secondary_trend_filter = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > 22) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 42) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 66) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 0.95) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
            (dataframe["macd_hist"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["ema20_slope_3"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["close_ema50_dist"] < 0.035)
        )

        if pair == "OP/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0025) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.020) &
                (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.012) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0025) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0020) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0020) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.016) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["adx_14"] > 23)
            )
        elif pair == "BTC/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"] * 0.995)
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.011) &
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])
            )
        elif pair == "BNB/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.015) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 68)
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.014) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 64) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.026) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 64) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.023) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 62) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
        else:
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.022) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            secondary_pair_filter = pair_filter

        primary_long = (
            macd_cross &
            base_trend_filter &
            pair_filter
        )

        secondary_long = (
            ema_reclaim &
            secondary_trend_filter &
            secondary_pair_filter
        )

        dataframe.loc[primary_long, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "trend_macd_adx_ema200",
        )

        dataframe.loc[secondary_long & (~primary_long), ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "trend_ema_reclaim_adx",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

```json
{
  "strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v001",
  "strategy_family": "trend_following",
  "mutation_type": "add_entry_filter",
  "reason": "趋势跟踪族首次尝试。借鉴 historical_best (run_20260531_014140_v001) 的 MACD 交叉动量核心逻辑（36笔交易、86%胜率），但其5笔止损亏损9.48吞噬了ROI收益8.84。根本原因是入场时未确认趋势强度，导致在震荡区间入场后深度回撤触发止损。本轮结构假设：在 MACD 金叉基础上叠加 ADX 趋势强度过滤（ADX>20）和 EMA200 方向过滤（价格在 EMA200 之上），只在明确上升趋势中入场，从而减少震荡区间的假信号和止损触发次数。与小步微调不同：这是全新的趋势确认结构，不是在 nearest_candidate 上做参数调整。收紧 stoploss 至 -1.8% 减少单笔亏损，ROI 首档提高到 1.2% 更快锁利。预计5个币种各5~9笔交易，总计25~45笔。",
  "expected_effect": "通过 ADX+EMA200 趋势过滤减少50%以上的低质量入场，止损触发次数从5次降至2~3次，stop_loss_profit_abs 控制在 roi_profit_abs 以内，profit_factor 提升至 1.0 以上，交易数落在 25~45 区间。",

    },

      "logic": "macd > macd_signal AND macd.shift(1) <= macd_signal.shift(1) AND adx > 20 AND close > ema_200 AND rsi < 70 AND volume > volume_sma_20",
      "entry_tag": "trend_macd_adx_ema200"
    },
    "minimal_roi": {
      "0": 0.012,
      "30": 0.008,

      "140": 0.003,
      "240": 0.001
    },
    "stoploss": -0.018,
    "trailing_stop": true,
    "trailing_stop_positive": 0.007,
    "trailing_stop_positive_offset": 0.018,
    "trailing_only_offset_is_reached": true,
    "use_exit_signal": false,
    "timeframe": "5m",
    "protections": [
      {
        "method": "CooldownPeriod",
        "stop_duration_candles": 12
      },
      {
        "method": "StoplossGuard",
        "lookback_period_candles": 48,
        "trade_limit": 1,
        "stop_duration_candles": 48,

      },
      {
        "method": "MaxDrawdown",

        "stop_duration_candles": 36,
        "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.008
      }
    ],
    "pairs": ["BTC/USDT", "OP/USDT", "SOL/USDT", "BNB/USDT", "DOGE/USDT"]
  },
  "do_not_change": [
    "use_exit_signal must remain False",
    "spot long-only, no shorting, no leverage, no martingale",
    "no external API calls",
    "must remain IStrategy format",
    "trailing_stop must not replace fixed stoploss as primary risk control",
    "do not loosen entry to chase trade count"
  ],
  "session_parent_reason": "本轮是 trend_following 族首次生成。选择 add_entry_filter 是因为历史经验表明核心问题是低质量入场导致止损吞噬利润，而非交易数不足。ADX+EMA200 是经典趋势确认组合，能有效过滤震荡区间的 MACD 假金叉。本次 run 尚无失败记录，从结构探索角度出发设计全新入场逻辑。"
}
```

recent_failed=当前最佳基准：
- profit_total_pct=-0.74
- profit_factor=0.6300
- max_drawdown_pct=1.45
- total_trades=47

- v003：交易数172，收益率-2.95%，PF0.51，回撤3.42%，失败=训练区间亏损超过 baseline；Profit factor 低于 baseline；最大回撤超过目标；交易数超过目标上限；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。；high_frequency_failure：交易数超过 max_trades * 2，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
- v001：交易数66，收益率-0.15%，PF0.87，回撤0.47%，失败=高频风险：交易数超过目标上限，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']
禁止重复：
- 不要生成与失败策略相同的 stoploss / ROI / trailing_stop 组合
- 不要继续生成 300+ 交易的高频策略
- 不要继续宽松 RSI/EMA/momentum 高频结构
- 不要为了满足 min_trades 而过度放宽入场
- 优先减少 stop_loss 损失和验证区间回撤
last_failure=训练区间交易数超过目标上限
必须只选择一个 mutation_type，允许值：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter,adjust_roi,adjust_stoploss,reduce_trade_frequency,disable_or_adjust_trailing,tighten_volume_filter,cooldown_or_protection。
JSON 必须包含: mutation_type,reason,expected_effect,changes,do_not_change。
硬约束：本轮训练区间总交易数目标是 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 会直接跳过验证；16~19 会继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best，超过 90 会直接跳过验证。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
重点：减少固定止损吞噬 ROI，不是增加交易数量。禁止/不推荐：increase_trade_frequency,loosen_entry,enable_trailing,replace_stoploss_with_trailing,adjust_stoploss_only,widen_stoploss。优先：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter。trailing 规则：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。

========== 策略结构探索模式 ==========
当前不是微调模式，而是结构探索模式。不要只围绕 current best 做小步改动；请读取 historical_best/nearest/memory 的经验，但允许生成不同结构的策略族。
本轮 mutation_spec 必须包含 strategy_family 字段，且值必须严格等于 planned_strategy_family。
planned_strategy_family=pullback_reversal
允许的 strategy_family=["trend_following", "pullback_reversal", "breakout_momentum", "low_volatility_mean_reversion", "strict_risk_filter"]
允许重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑。
必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 策略格式、现货 long-only、不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不外部 API、use_exit_signal=False 等风控安全边界。
探索模式交易数硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20，ideal_min_trades=25，ideal_max_trades=45，max_trades=60。任何 strategy_family 生成的入场逻辑都必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止生成明显高频策略；如果预计交易数会超过 60，不要输出该方案。
如果当前 family 统计中 pending_low_trade_profitable_near_miss=true 或 last_low_trade_near_miss 非空，下一轮必须优先轻微放宽该 near-miss 的入场条件，把交易数提升到 20~25，不要直接跳到完全不同 family。
breakout_momentum 和 strict_risk_filter 对频率错误更敏感：如果它们曾明显超出 max_trades，必须显著收紧触发事件、冷却、成交量/趋势过滤，避免再次高频。
trailing 限制：不要建议 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
避免连续生成同类策略；每个 family 至少尝试一次；明显连续亏损或连续 high_frequency_failure 的 family 会被降低权重或本 run 禁选。
请在 reason 中说明该 family 的结构假设、从历史 best 中借鉴了什么、与小步微调有何不同。

========== 用户额外策略顾问规则 ==========
1. 当前固定使用 BTC/USDT、OP/USDT、SOL/USDT、BNB/USDT、DOGE/USDT 五个交易对。
2. 不要简单用 trailing 替代 fixed stoploss。trailing 只能在已有盈利后启用，不能让移动止损成为主要亏损来源。
3. 当前核心目标是减少低质量入场和亏损单数量，不是盲目提高交易频率。
4. 如果某个 family 连续产生高频亏损，应降低该 family 权重。
5. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。

本轮为什么选择当前 mutation_type=pullback_reversal 结构假设：价格在上升趋势中回调至支撑区域（EMA/Bollinger下轨附近）后反弹入场，利用RSI超卖反转+趋势确认过滤低质量信号。与上轮 trend_following（MACD交叉+ADX趋势）不同，本轮聚焦于回调深度确认和反转信号质量。借鉴 historical_best 的高winrate（86%）和 nearest_candidate 在 feb_2026 验证期 PF=1.47 的经验，核心改进：1）用RSI从超卖区回升作为入场触发而非MACD交叉，减少趋势中段的假信号；2）要求价格触及Bollinger下轨或EMA支撑后反弹，确保入场点有足够安全边际；3）收紧stoploss至-1.8%减少单笔亏损；4）对BTC/USDT要求更严格的回调深度（ATR倍数）因其在历史中止损亏损最大。上轮 add_entry_filter 失败因交易数66超标，本轮用完全不同的入场逻辑结构（pullback_reversal）而非在旧结构上加过滤器。

当前启用策略结构探索模式，不是微调模式。请生成 strategy_family=pullback_reversal 的新结构 challenger；可以重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑，但必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 格式和风控安全边界。，只输出 Python 代码。类名必须为 MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v002，继承 IStrategy，timeframe='5m'，并实现 populate_indicators/populate_entry_trend/populate_exit_trend。
champion_strategy_code=
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_014140_v001(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.025,
        "15": 0.018,
        "35": 0.012,
        "60": 0.007,
        "120": 0.004,
    }

    stoploss = -0.035

    trailing_stop = False
    # trailing_stop_positive = 0.008
    # trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.014
    # trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        # New indicator: EMA 20 slope (percentage change over 3 candles)
        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        # New indicators required by mutation_spec
        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 1.0) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &      # Added: price above EMA200
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])       # Added: EMA50 above EMA200
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 1.05)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &                           # Changed from 28 to 22 per mutation spec
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &                            # Changed from 17 to 18 per mutation spec
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 0.9) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

硬性约束：
1) 当前是结构探索模式：允许不局限于 champion 小步改动，但必须吸收历史经验，避免重复已失败结构。
2) 策略必须在训练区间产生合理交易，严禁生成完全无交易策略。
2) 训练区间总交易数目标为 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 笔直接跳过验证；16~19 笔继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best；超过 90 直接跳过验证。

3) 优先保证训练区间有稳定交易，不要把过滤条件堆得过严。
4) 如果上一轮 total_trades=0，本轮必须大幅放宽入场条件，并确保训练区间产生交易。
5) 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
6) use_exit_signal 必须为 False，不允许改为 True。
7) 仅现货 long only：不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不无限补仓，不允许 conditions_short。
8) 不调用外部 API，不读取手动交易记录。
9) 禁止使用过强过滤的全 AND 叠加（如 close>ema200_1h、rsi_1h>55、ema20>ema50>ema100、volume>rolling_mean*1.5 同时成立）。
10) 入场逻辑可更宽松，鼓励用 OR 组合：RSI 回调反弹 / EMA 短周期金叉 / 布林带下轨反弹 / MACD 转强 / 成交量不极低。
11) 不允许生成完全无交易策略，也不允许超过 90 笔训练交易。
11a) 探索模式额外硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20 / ideal_min_trades=25 / ideal_max_trades=45 / max_trades=60；入场逻辑必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止明显高频；如果预计超过 60 笔，不要实现该方案。
12) 目标不是追求 0 回撤，而是在足够交易数下综合表现优于 baseline。
13) trailing 限制：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；不要实现 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。

- 必须至少改变一个可由 fingerprint 检测到的策略结构：entry_conditions / pair-specific branch / indicator / ROI / stoploss / protections 之一。
- 如果 mutation_spec.mutation_type 是 pair_specific_filter、tag_specific_filter、add_entry_filter、tighten_entry_trigger，必须在 populate_entry_trend 中生成对应的实际条件，并影响 enter_long。
- 如果 mutation_spec 要求 ETH/USDT 专属过滤，代码里必须出现明确的 ETH/USDT 分支或等价 pair-specific 条件（例如 metadata['pair'] == 'ETH/USDT' 或 pair 变量判断）。
- 如果 mutation_spec 要求新增指标（ema20、ema50、adx、atr_pct、bollinger_middleband、volume_mean_20 等），必须在 populate_indicators 中实际计算这些 dataframe 列，并在入场条件中引用相关列。
- 避免把入场条件写成几乎永远不触发的苛刻组合。

========== 本次运行开始前 AI 复盘总结：codegen_guidance ==========
内容来自 pre_run_ai_review.json。只作为代码生成参考，必须仍以 mutation_spec 为准，并且必须产生可检测的真实策略结构变化。
{"must_implement": ["stoploss收紧至-0.015~-0.020区间", "trailing_stop=True且trailing_stop_positive=0.005~0.01，trailing_stop_positive_offset=0.015~0.02（仅在盈利后启用）", "对OP/USDT和SOL/USDT增加ATR或波动率相关的入场门槛", "ROI table调整：首档0.012~0.015以更快锁定小利润", "populate_entry_trend中必须有可检测的条件变化"], "avoid_equivalent_code": ["不要生成与nearest_candidate行为等价的策略（仅改名）", "不要生成与上轮v001相同的trend_macd_filtered单一入场标签", "不要复制上轮的pair_filters列表中包含eth/usdt（当前交易对不含ETH）"], "required_detectable_changes": ["stoploss数值必须与nearest_candidate不同", "trailing_stop配置必须新增或修改", "populate_entry_trend中至少有一个新的条件或阈值变化", "entry_tag必须反映实际入场逻辑变化", "minimal_roi至少一个档位数值变化"]}

========== 用户额外代码生成规则 ==========
1. 必须真实落地 mutation_spec。
2. 禁止只改 class name、注释、变量名。
3. 如果新增过滤条件，populate_entry_trend 必须实际出现对应条件。
4. 如果新增指标，populate_indicators 必须实际计算。
5. 如果生成的策略与父策略行为等价，应主动报错，不要输出等价代码。
6. 上一轮如果因为策略重复失败，本轮禁止继续使用同一个 codegen provider，且必须改变 entry_conditions 或 indicators，不允许只改变类名、注释、变量名。
7. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。


============================================================
v002 strategy.py
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_111202/v002/strategy.py
============================================================
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v002(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.014,
        "25": 0.010,
        "55": 0.006,
        "110": 0.0035,
        "220": 0.0015,
    }

    stoploss = -0.018

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.007
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.018
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 160

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 10,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 2,
                "stop_duration_candles": 48,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 96,
                "trade_limit": 4,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_21"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=21)
        dataframe["ema_34"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=34)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx_14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2.0)
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = bollinger["mid"]
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]

        dataframe["bb_lower_touch"] = dataframe["low"] <= (dataframe["bb_lower"] * 1.006)
        dataframe["ema21_touch"] = dataframe["low"] <= (dataframe["ema_21"] * 1.002)

        dataframe["recent_support_touch"] = (
            (dataframe["bb_lower_touch"] | dataframe["ema21_touch"])
            .rolling(window=4, min_periods=1)
            .max()
            .astype(bool)
        )

        dataframe["rsi_was_oversold_4"] = (
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 35)
            .rolling(window=4, min_periods=1)
            .max()
            .astype(bool)
        )

        dataframe["rsi_was_doge_oversold_4"] = (
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 38)
            .rolling(window=4, min_periods=1)
            .max()
            .astype(bool)
        )

        dataframe["pullback_depth_atr"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["close"]) / dataframe["atr_14"]
        dataframe["pullback_depth_atr_4"] = dataframe["pullback_depth_atr"].rolling(window=4, min_periods=1).max()

        dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)
        dataframe["close_above_ema21"] = dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_21"]

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        trend_filter = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
            (dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] > -0.0012) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"] * 0.985)
        )

        pullback_filter = (
            dataframe["recent_support_touch"] &
            (
                (dataframe["close"] <= dataframe["ema_21"] * 1.010) |
                (dataframe["close"] <= dataframe["bb_middle"])
            )
        )

        rsi_reversal_35 = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["rsi_14"], 35) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 48)
        )

        close_reclaim_reversal = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_21"]) &
            dataframe["rsi_was_oversold_4"] &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] >= 35) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 52)
        )

        base_reversal_trigger = rsi_reversal_35 | close_reclaim_reversal

        volume_confirm = dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.12

        quality_filter = (
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > 20) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0025) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.030) &
            (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.006) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
        )

        long_condition = (
            trend_filter &
            pullback_filter &
            base_reversal_trigger &
            volume_confirm &
            quality_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            btc_volume_confirm = dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.15
            btc_deep_pullback = dataframe["pullback_depth_atr_4"] > 1.0
            long_condition = (
                trend_filter &
                pullback_filter &
                base_reversal_trigger &
                btc_volume_confirm &
                quality_filter &
                btc_deep_pullback &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 46)
            )

        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            doge_rsi_reversal = (
                qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["rsi_14"], 38) &
                dataframe["rsi_was_doge_oversold_4"] &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 52)
            )
            doge_reclaim_reversal = (
                qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_21"]) &
                dataframe["rsi_was_doge_oversold_4"] &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] >= 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 55)
            )
            long_condition = (
                trend_filter &
                pullback_filter &
                (doge_rsi_reversal | doge_reclaim_reversal) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.05) &
                (dataframe["adx_14"] > 18) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.004) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.040) &
                (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.008) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
            )

        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            sol_volatility_gate = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0035) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.032) &
                (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.008)
            )
            long_condition = (
                trend_filter &
                pullback_filter &
                base_reversal_trigger &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.08) &
                (dataframe["adx_14"] > 19) &
                sol_volatility_gate &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
            )

        elif pair == "OP/USDT":
            op_volatility_gate = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0045) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.038) &
                (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.010)
            )
            long_condition = (
                trend_filter &
                pullback_filter &
                base_reversal_trigger &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.08) &
                (dataframe["adx_14"] > 19) &
                op_volatility_gate &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
            )

        elif pair == "BNB/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                trend_filter &
                pullback_filter &
                base_reversal_trigger &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.10) &
                (dataframe["adx_14"] > 20) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0025) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.024) &
                (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.006) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
            )

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "pullback_bb_rsi_reversal",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v002(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.014,
        "25": 0.010,
        "55": 0.006,
        "110": 0.0035,
        "220": 0.0015,
    }

    stoploss = -0.018

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.007
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.018
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 160

    def protections(self):

            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 10,

                "method": "StoplossGuard",

                "trade_limit": 2,
                "stop_duration_candles": 48,

            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 96,
                "trade_limit": 4,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:

        dataframe["ema_34"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=34)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx_14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2.0)
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = bollinger["mid"]
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]

        dataframe["bb_lower_touch"] = dataframe["low"] <= (dataframe["bb_lower"] * 1.006)
        dataframe["ema21_touch"] = dataframe["low"] <= (dataframe["ema_21"] * 1.002)

        dataframe["recent_support_touch"] = (
            (dataframe["bb_lower_touch"] | dataframe["ema21_touch"])
            .rolling(window=4, min_periods=1)
            .max()
            .astype(bool)
        )

        dataframe["rsi_was_oversold_4"] = (
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 35)
            .rolling(window=4, min_periods=1)
            .max()
            .astype(bool)
        )

        dataframe["rsi_was_doge_oversold_4"] = (
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 38)
            .rolling(window=4, min_periods=1)
            .max()
            .astype(bool)
        )

        dataframe["pullback_depth_atr"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["close"]) / dataframe["atr_14"]
        dataframe["pullback_depth_atr_4"] = dataframe["pullback_depth_atr"].rolling(window=4, min_periods=1).max()

        dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)
        dataframe["close_above_ema21"] = dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_21"]

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        trend_filter = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
            (dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] > -0.0012) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"] * 0.985)
        )

        pullback_filter = (
            dataframe["recent_support_touch"] &
            (
                (dataframe["close"] <= dataframe["ema_21"] * 1.010) |
                (dataframe["close"] <= dataframe["bb_middle"])
            )
        )

        rsi_reversal_35 = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["rsi_14"], 35) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 48)
        )

        close_reclaim_reversal = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_21"]) &
            dataframe["rsi_was_oversold_4"] &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] >= 35) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 52)
        )

        base_reversal_trigger = rsi_reversal_35 | close_reclaim_reversal

        volume_confirm = dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.12

        quality_filter = (
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > 20) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0025) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.030) &
            (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.006) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
        )

        long_condition = (
            trend_filter &
            pullback_filter &
            base_reversal_trigger &
            volume_confirm &
            quality_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            btc_volume_confirm = dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.15
            btc_deep_pullback = dataframe["pullback_depth_atr_4"] > 1.0
            long_condition = (
                trend_filter &
                pullback_filter &
                base_reversal_trigger &
                btc_volume_confirm &
                quality_filter &

                (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 52)
            )
            doge_reclaim_reversal = (
                qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_21"]) &
                dataframe["rsi_was_doge_oversold_4"] &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] >= 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] <= 55)
            )
            long_condition = (
                trend_filter &
                pullback_filter &
                (doge_rsi_reversal | doge_reclaim_reversal) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.05) &
                (dataframe["adx_14"] > 18) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.004) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.040) &
                (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.008) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
            )

        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            sol_volatility_gate = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0035) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.032) &
                (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.008)
            )
            long_condition = (
                trend_filter &
                pullback_filter &
                base_reversal_trigger &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.08) &
                (dataframe["adx_14"] > 19) &
                sol_volatility_gate &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0)
            )

        elif pair == "OP/USDT":
            op_volatility_gate = (

                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.038) &
                (dataframe["bb_width"] > 0.010)

v002 strategy_spec.raw.txt
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_111202/v002/strategy_spec.raw.txt

```json
{
  "strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v002",
  "strategy_family": "pullback_reversal",
  "mutation_type": "tighten_entry_trigger",
  "reason": "pullback_reversal 结构假设：价格在上升趋势中回调至支撑区域（EMA/Bollinger下轨附近）后反弹入场，利用RSI超卖反转+趋势确认过滤低质量信号。与上轮 trend_following（MACD交叉+ADX趋势）不同，本轮聚焦于回调深度确认和反转信号质量。借鉴 historical_best 的高winrate（86%）和 nearest_candidate 在 feb_2026 验证期 PF=1.47 的经验，核心改进：1）用RSI从超卖区回升作为入场触发而非MACD交叉，减少趋势中段的假信号；2）要求价格触及Bollinger下轨或EMA支撑后反弹，确保入场点有足够安全边际；3）收紧stoploss至-1.8%减少单笔亏损；4）对BTC/USDT要求更严格的回调深度（ATR倍数）因其在历史中止损亏损最大。上轮 add_entry_filter 失败因交易数66超标，本轮用完全不同的入场逻辑结构（pullback_reversal）而非在旧结构上加过滤器。",
  "expected_effect": "预计交易数30~45笔（5币种×6~9笔/币），因回调入场天然低频；stoploss收紧至-1.8%使单笔最大亏损约$9（vs之前$15+）；回调入场点距支撑近，止损触发概率降低；目标PF>0.95，回撤<1.5%。",
  "session_parent_reason": "上轮 trend_following + add_entry_filter 产生66笔交易超标，MACD交叉在BTC上PF仅0.27。本轮切换到 pullback_reversal family，用完全不同的入场逻辑（RSI超卖反弹+布林下轨支撑），避免重复高频MACD结构。",
  "changes": {
```

recent_failed=当前最佳基准：
- profit_total_pct=-0.74
- profit_factor=0.6300
- max_drawdown_pct=1.45
- total_trades=47

禁止重复：
- 不要生成与失败策略相同的 stoploss / ROI / trailing_stop 组合
- 不要继续生成 300+ 交易的高频策略
- 不要继续宽松 RSI/EMA/momentum 高频结构
- 不要为了满足 min_trades 而过度放宽入场
- 优先减少 stop_loss 损失和验证区间回撤
last_failure=训练区间无交易
必须只选择一个 mutation_type，允许值：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter,adjust_roi,adjust_stoploss,reduce_trade_frequency,disable_or_adjust_trailing,tighten_volume_filter,cooldown_or_protection。
JSON 必须包含: mutation_type,reason,expected_effect,changes,do_not_change。
硬约束：本轮训练区间总交易数目标是 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 会直接跳过验证；16~19 会继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best，超过 90 会直接跳过验证。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
重点：减少固定止损吞噬 ROI，不是增加交易数量。禁止/不推荐：increase_trade_frequency,loosen_entry,enable_trailing,replace_stoploss_with_trailing,adjust_stoploss_only,widen_stoploss。优先：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter。trailing 规则：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。

========== 策略结构探索模式 ==========
当前不是微调模式，而是结构探索模式。不要只围绕 current best 做小步改动；请读取 historical_best/nearest/memory 的经验，但允许生成不同结构的策略族。
本轮 mutation_spec 必须包含 strategy_family 字段，且值必须严格等于 planned_strategy_family。
planned_strategy_family=breakout_momentum
允许的 strategy_family=["trend_following", "pullback_reversal", "breakout_momentum", "low_volatility_mean_reversion", "strict_risk_filter"]
允许重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑。
必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 策略格式、现货 long-only、不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不外部 API、use_exit_signal=False 等风控安全边界。
探索模式交易数硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20，ideal_min_trades=25，ideal_max_trades=45，max_trades=60。任何 strategy_family 生成的入场逻辑都必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止生成明显高频策略；如果预计交易数会超过 60，不要输出该方案。
如果当前 family 统计中 pending_low_trade_profitable_near_miss=true 或 last_low_trade_near_miss 非空，下一轮必须优先轻微放宽该 near-miss 的入场条件，把交易数提升到 20~25，不要直接跳到完全不同 family。
breakout_momentum 和 strict_risk_filter 对频率错误更敏感：如果它们曾明显超出 max_trades，必须显著收紧触发事件、冷却、成交量/趋势过滤，避免再次高频。
trailing 限制：不要建议 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
避免连续生成同类策略；每个 family 至少尝试一次；明显连续亏损或连续 high_frequency_failure 的 family 会被降低权重或本 run 禁选。
请在 reason 中说明该 family 的结构假设、从历史 best 中借鉴了什么、与小步微调有何不同。

========== 用户额外策略顾问规则 ==========
1. 当前固定使用 BTC/USDT、OP/USDT、SOL/USDT、BNB/USDT、DOGE/USDT 五个交易对。
2. 不要简单用 trailing 替代 fixed stoploss。trailing 只能在已有盈利后启用，不能让移动止损成为主要亏损来源。
3. 当前核心目标是减少低质量入场和亏损单数量，不是盲目提高交易频率。
4. 如果某个 family 连续产生高频亏损，应降低该 family 权重。
5. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。

champion_strategy_code=
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_014140_v001(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.025,
        "15": 0.018,
        "35": 0.012,
        "60": 0.007,
        "120": 0.004,
    }

    stoploss = -0.035

    trailing_stop = False
    # trailing_stop_positive = 0.008
    # trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.014
    # trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        # New indicator: EMA 20 slope (percentage change over 3 candles)
        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        # New indicators required by mutation_spec
        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 1.0) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &      # Added: price above EMA200
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])       # Added: EMA50 above EMA200
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 1.05)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &                           # Changed from 28 to 22 per mutation spec
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &                            # Changed from 17 to 18 per mutation spec
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 0.9) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

mutation_spec={"strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v003", "strategy_family": "breakout_momentum", "mutation_type": "adjust_roi", "reason": "breakout_momentum 族首次尝试。结构假设：只在价格突破近期高点且伴随成交量放大时入场，捕捉短期动量延续。与之前 trend_following（MACD交叉）和 pullback_reversal 不同，本策略用 Donchian Channel 突破 + 成交量确认作为核心入场逻辑，天然过滤震荡行情中的假信号。从 historical_best 借鉴：保留 5m timeframe、CooldownPeriod
