from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v003(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.014,
        "25": 0.010,
        "60": 0.006,
        "120": 0.003,
        "240": 0.001,
    }

    stoploss = -0.019

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.007
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.017
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 120

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 10,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 2,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 96,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 20,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["donchian_upper_20"] = dataframe["high"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).max()
        dataframe["donchian_lower_20"] = dataframe["low"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).min()
        dataframe["donchian_mid_20"] = (dataframe["donchian_upper_20"] + dataframe["donchian_lower_20"]) / 2.0
        dataframe["donchian_width_20"] = (
            (dataframe["donchian_upper_20"] - dataframe["donchian_lower_20"]) / dataframe["close"]
        )

        dataframe["donchian_upper_14"] = dataframe["high"].rolling(window=14, min_periods=14).max()
        dataframe["breakout_level_20"] = dataframe["donchian_upper_20"].shift(1)
        dataframe["breakout_level_14"] = dataframe["donchian_upper_14"].shift(1)

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_sma_50"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=50, min_periods=50).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_sma_20"]

        dataframe["adx_14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["plus_di"] = ta.PLUS_DI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["minus_di"] = ta.MINUS_DI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["atr_pct_sma_20"] = dataframe["atr_pct"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_5"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = bollinger["mid"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]
        dataframe["bb_width_sma_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        valid_volume = (
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["volume_sma_20"] > 0)
        )

        trend_context = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (dataframe["plus_di"] > dataframe["minus_di"])
        )

        not_overheated = (
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 43) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0025) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.025)
        )

        strong_breakout = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["breakout_level_20"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.50) &
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > 22) &
            trend_context &
            not_overheated &
            valid_volume
        )

        early_breakout = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["breakout_level_14"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.18) &
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["adx_14"] >= dataframe["adx_14"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["donchian_mid_20"]) &
            trend_context &
            not_overheated &
            valid_volume
        )

        volatility_gate = (
            (dataframe["donchian_width_20"] > 0.008) &
            (dataframe["donchian_width_20"] < 0.065) &
            (dataframe["bb_width"] > dataframe["bb_width_sma_20"] * 0.75)
        )

        if pair in ("SOL/USDT", "OP/USDT"):
            pair_specific_gate = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > dataframe["atr_pct_sma_20"] * 0.75) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.020) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.22)
            )
        else:
            pair_specific_gate = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.023) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.10)
            )

        long_condition = (
            (strong_breakout | early_breakout) &
            volatility_gate &
            pair_specific_gate
        )

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "breakout_volume_confirm",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

v003 codegen.raw.txt
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_111202/v003/codegen.raw.txt

from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v003(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.014,
        "25": 0.010,
        "60": 0.006,
        "120": 0.003,
        "240": 0.001,
    }

    stoploss = -0.019

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.007
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.017
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 120

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 10,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 2,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 96,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 20,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["donchian_upper_20"] = dataframe["high"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).max()
        dataframe["donchian_lower_20"] = dataframe["low"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).min()
        dataframe["donchian_mid_20"] = (dataframe["donchian_upper_20"] + dataframe["donchian_lower_20"]) / 2.0
        dataframe["donchian_width_20"] = (
            (dataframe["donchian_upper_20"] - dataframe["donchian_lower_20"]) / dataframe["close"]
        )

        dataframe["donchian_upper_14"] = dataframe["high"].rolling(window=14, min_periods=14).max()
        dataframe["breakout_level_20"] = dataframe["donchian_upper_20"].shift(1)
        dataframe["breakout_level_14"] = dataframe["donchian_upper_14"].shift(1)

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        dataframe["volume_sma_50"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=50, min_periods=50).mean()
        dataframe["volume_ratio_20"] = dataframe["volume"] / dataframe["volume_sma_20"]

        dataframe["adx_14"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["plus_di"] = ta.PLUS_DI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["minus_di"] = ta.MINUS_DI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["atr_pct_sma_20"] = dataframe["atr_pct"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_5"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = bollinger["mid"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]
        dataframe["bb_width_sma_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        valid_volume = (
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["volume_sma_20"] > 0)
        )

        trend_context = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (dataframe["plus_di"] > dataframe["minus_di"])
        )

        not_overheated = (
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 43) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] > 0.0025) &
            (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.025)
        )

        strong_breakout = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["breakout_level_20"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.50) &
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > 22) &
            trend_context &
            not_overheated &
            valid_volume
        )

        early_breakout = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["breakout_level_14"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.18) &
            (dataframe["adx_14"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["adx_14"] >= dataframe["adx_14"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["donchian_mid_20"]) &
            trend_context &
            not_overheated &
            valid_volume
        )

        volatility_gate = (
            (dataframe["donchian_width_20"] > 0.008) &
            (dataframe["donchian_width_20"] < 0.065) &
            (dataframe["bb_width"] > dataframe["bb_width_sma_20"] * 0.75)
        )

        if pair in ("SOL/USDT", "OP/USDT"):
            pair_specific_gate = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] > dataframe["atr_pct_sma_20"] * 0.75) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.020) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.22)
            )
        else:
            pair_specific_gate = (
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.023) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.10)
            )

        long_condition = (
            (strong_breakout | early_breakout) &
            volatility_gate &
            pair_specific_gate
        )

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "breakout_volume_confirm",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

{
  "strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v004",
  "strategy_family": "low_volatility_mean_reversion",
  "mutation_type": "reduce_trade_frequency",
  "reason": "低波动均值回归策略族首次尝试。核心假设：在低波动环境中（ATR收缩、BB带宽收窄），价格偏离均值后大概率回归，此时入场胜率高且回撤浅。从historical_best借鉴：champion的winrate高达86%说明精选入场有效，但其MACD单信号导致ETH/BTC亏损；本策略改用BB+RSI均值回归逻辑，仅在价格触及BB下轨且RSI超卖、同时ATR处于低位时入场，天然过滤高波动期的假信号。与之前trend_following/breakout_momentum的区别：不追涨，不追突破，只在低波动收缩期做超卖反弹。选择reduce_trade_frequency是因为均值回归本身就是低频精选逻辑，需要通过ATR百分位+BB带宽双重过滤来确保只在真正低波动期触发，避免高频问题。上轮add_entry_filter/tighten_entry_trigger/adjust_roi均失败，本轮采用完全不同的indicator组合和entry逻辑结构。",
  "session_parent_reason": "本轮选择reduce_trade_frequency而非已失败的add_entry_filter/tighten_entry_trigger/adjust_roi，因为本策略是全新结构（BB均值回归），其入场逻辑本身就是低频设计，reduce_trade_frequency体现在用ATR百分位和BB带宽双重门槛控制触发频率。",

========== 策略结构探索模式 ==========
当前不是微调模式，而是结构探索模式。不要只围绕 current best 做小步改动；请读取 historical_best/nearest/memory 的经验，但允许生成不同结构的策略族。

允许重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑。
必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 策略格式、现货 long-only、不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不外部 API、use_exit_signal=False 等风控安全边界。
探索模式交易数硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20，ideal_min_trades=25，ideal_max_trades=45，max_trades=60。任何 strategy_family 生成的入场逻辑都必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止生成明显高频策略；如果预计交易数会超过 60，不要输出该方案。

breakout_momentum 和 strict_risk_filter 对频率错误更敏感：如果它们曾明显超出 max_trades，必须显著收紧触发事件、冷却、成交量/趋势过滤，避免再次高频。
trailing 限制：不要建议 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
避免连续生成同类策略；每个 family 至少尝试一次；明显连续亏损或连续 high_frequency_failure 的 family 会被降低权重或本 run 禁选。

========== 用户额外策略顾问规则 ==========
1. 当前固定使用 BTC/USDT、OP/USDT、SOL/USDT、BNB/USDT、DOGE/USDT 五个交易对。
2. 不要简单用 trailing 替代 fixed stoploss。trailing 只能在已有盈利后启用，不能让移动止损成为主要亏损来源。
3. 当前核心目标是减少低质量入场和亏损单数量，不是盲目提高交易频率。
4. 如果某个 family 连续产生高频亏损，应降低该 family 权重。
5. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。

========== advisor 返回的本轮选择（审计）==========
本轮选择 mutation_type=reduce_trade_frequency
本轮为什么选择当前 mutation_type=低波动均值回归策略族首次尝试。核心假设：在低波动环境中（ATR收缩、BB带宽收窄），价格偏离均值后大概率回归，此时入场胜率高且回撤浅。从historical_best借鉴：champion的winrate高达86%说明精选入场有效，但其MACD单信号导致ETH/BTC亏损；本策略改用BB+RSI均值回归逻辑，仅在价格触及BB下轨且RSI超卖、同时ATR处于低位时入场，天然过滤高波动期的假信号。与之前trend_following/breakout_momentum的区别：不追涨，不追突破，只在低波动收缩期做超卖反弹。选择reduce_trade_frequency是因为均值回归本身就是低频精选逻辑，需要通过ATR百分位+BB带宽双重过滤来确保只在真正低波动期触发，避免高频问题。上轮add_entry_filter/tighten_entry_trigger/adjust_roi均失败，本轮采用完全不同的indicator组合和entry逻辑结构。

当前启用策略结构探索模式，不是微调模式。请生成 strategy_family=low_volatility_mean_reversion 的新结构 challenger；可以重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑，但必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 格式和风控安全边界。，只输出 Python 代码。类名必须为 MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v004，继承 IStrategy，timeframe='5m'，并实现 populate_indicators/populate_entry_trend/populate_exit_trend。
champion_strategy_code=
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_014140_v001(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.025,
        "15": 0.018,
        "35": 0.012,
        "60": 0.007,
        "120": 0.004,
    }

    stoploss = -0.035

    trailing_stop = False
    # trailing_stop_positive = 0.008
    # trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.014
    # trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        # New indicator: EMA 20 slope (percentage change over 3 candles)
        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        # New indicators required by mutation_spec
        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 1.0) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &      # Added: price above EMA200
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])       # Added: EMA50 above EMA200
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 1.05)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &                           # Changed from 28 to 22 per mutation spec
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &                            # Changed from 17 to 18 per mutation spec
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 0.9) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

mutation_spec={"strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v004", "strategy_family": "low_volatility_mean_reversion", "mutation_type": "reduce_trade_frequency", "reason": "低波动均值回归策略族首次尝试。核心假设：在低波动环境中（ATR收缩、BB带宽收窄），价格偏离均值后大概率回归，此时入场胜率高且回撤浅。从historical_best借鉴：champion的winrate高达86%说明精选入场有效，但其MACD单信号导致ETH/BTC亏损；本策略改用BB+RSI均值回归逻辑，仅在价格触及BB下轨且RSI超卖、同时ATR处于低位时入场，天然过滤高波动期的假信号。与之前trend_following/breakout_momentum的区别：不追涨，不追突破，只在低波动收缩期做超卖反弹。选择reduce_trade_frequency是因为均值回归本身就是低频精选逻辑，需要通过ATR百分位+BB带宽双重过滤来确保只在真正低波动期触发，避免高频问题。上轮add_entry_filter/tighten_entry_trigger/adjust_roi均失败，本轮采用完全不同的indicator组合和entry逻辑结构。", "session_parent_reason": "本轮选择reduce_trade_frequency而非已失败的add_entry_filter/tighten_entry_trigger/adjust_roi，因为本策略是全新结构（BB均值回归），其入场逻辑本身就是低频设计，reduce_trade_frequency体现在用ATR百分位和BB带宽双重门槛控制触发频率。", "expected_effect": {"total_trades": "25~40", "profit_factor": ">0.95", "max_drawdown_pct": "<1.5%", "stop_loss_ratio": "止损次数占比<15%，stop_loss_profit_abs < roi_profit_abs", "winrate": ">75%"}, "changes": {"indicators": {"remove": ["macd", "macd_signal", "macd_hist"], "add": ["bb_upper (Bollinger Band 20,2.0 upper)", "bb_lower (Bollinger Band 20,2.0 lower)", "bb_mid (Bollinger Band 20,2.0 mid/SMA20)", "bb_width = (bb_upper - bb_lower) / bb_mid", "bb_width_pct = bb_width.rank(pct=True, method='min') over rolling 120 candles", "rsi_14 (RSI period=14)", "atr_14 (ATR period=14)", "atr_pct = atr_14 / close", "atr_pct_rank = atr_pct.rolling(120).rank(pct=True)", "ema_50 (EMA 50 as trend filter)", "volume_sma_20 = volume.rolling(20).mean()"]}, "entry_logic": {"tag": "low_vol_mean_reversion", "conditions": ["close <= bb_lower (价格触及或跌破BB下轨)", "rsi_14 < 35 (RSI超卖确认)", "atr_pct_rank < 0.40 (ATR处于近120根K线的低40%分位，确认低波动环境)", "bb_width_pct < 0.45 (BB带宽收窄，确认盘整/低波动)", "close > ema_50 (仍在中期趋势上方，避免下跌趋势中抄底)", "volume > volume_sma_20 * 0.8 (成交量不能过低，确保流动性)"], "description": "仅在低波动盘整期、价格超卖触及BB下轨、且中期趋势仍向上时入场做多，等待均值回归"}, "minimal_roi": {"0": 0.015, "30": 0.01, "60": 0.006, "120": 0.003, "240": 0.001}, "stoploss": -0.018, "trailing_stop": true, "trailing_stop_positive": 0.007, "trailing_stop_positive_offset": 0.015, "trailing_only_offset_is_reached": true, "use_exit_signal": false, "timeframe": "5m", "protections": [{"method": "CooldownPeriod", "stop_duration_candles": 8}, {"method": "StoplossGuard", "lookback_period_candles": 60, "trade_limit": 2, "stop_duration_candles": 30, "only_per_pair": true}, {"method": "MaxDrawdown", "lookback_period_candles": 120, "trade_limit": 5, "stop_duration_candles": 20, "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012}], "pair_list": ["BTC/USDT", "OP/USDT", "SOL/USDT", "BNB/USDT", "DOGE/USDT"]}, "do_not_change": ["use_exit_signal must remain False", "spot long-only, no shorting, no leverage, no martingale", "Freqtrade IStrategy format", "no external API calls", "pair list must remain BTC/USDT, OP/USDT, SOL/USDT, BNB/USDT, DOGE/USDT", "trailing_stop must not replace fixed stoploss as primary risk control", "stoploss must not be wider than -0.025"]}
当前失败摘要=final_score<=0
硬性约束：
1) 当前是结构探索模式：允许不局限于 champion 小步改动，但必须吸收历史经验，避免重复已失败结构。
2) 策略必须在训练区间产生合理交易，严禁生成完全无交易策略。
2) 训练区间总交易数目标为 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 笔直接跳过验证；16~19 笔继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best；超过 90 直接跳过验证。
3) 禁止连续状态型宽松入场；优先 crossed_above/crossed_below 事件触发；每个策略最多 1~2 个 entry_tag。
4) 不允许多个 OR 条件堆叠造成高频；不允许为了增加交易数而放宽入场。
3) 优先保证训练区间有稳定交易，不要把过滤条件堆得过严。
4) 如果上一轮 total_trades=0，本轮必须大幅放宽入场条件，并确保训练区间产生交易。
5) 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
6) use_exit_signal 必须为 False，不允许改为 True。
7) 仅现货 long only：不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不无限补仓，不允许 conditions_short。
8) 不调用外部 API，不读取手动交易记录。
9) 禁止使用过强过滤的全 AND 叠加（如 close>ema200_1h、rsi_1h>55、ema20>ema50>ema100、volume>rolling_mean*1.5 同时成立）。
10) 入场逻辑可更宽松，鼓励用 OR 组合：RSI 回调反弹 / EMA 短周期金叉 / 布林带下轨反弹 / MACD 转强 / 成交量不极低。
11) 不允许生成完全无交易策略，也不允许超过 90 笔训练交易。
11a) 探索模式额外硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20 / ideal_min_trades=25 / ideal_max_trades=45 / max_trades=60；入场逻辑必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止明显高频；如果预计超过 60 笔，不要实现该方案。
12) 目标不是追求 0 回撤，而是在足够交易数下综合表现优于 baseline。
13) trailing 限制：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；不要实现 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
上一轮失败原因：final_score<=0
最近失败策略共同原因通常不是没有盈利单，而是固定止损或 trailing_stop_loss 吃掉 ROI 收益。

- profit_total_pct=-0.74
- profit_factor=0.6300
- max_drawdown_pct=1.45
- total_trades=47

- v003：交易数172，收益率-2.95%，PF0.51，回撤3.42%，失败=训练区间亏损超过 baseline；Profit factor 低于 baseline；最大回撤超过目标；交易数超过目标上限；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。；high_frequency_failure：交易数超过 max_trades * 2，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']

禁止重复：
- 不要生成与失败策略相同的 stoploss / ROI / trailing_stop 组合
- 不要继续生成 300+ 交易的高频策略
- 不要继续宽松 RSI/EMA/momentum 高频结构
- 不要为了满足 min_trades 而过度放宽入场
- 优先减少 stop_loss 损失和验证区间回撤

- 总收益(USDT)：-7.43

- 如果 mutation_spec 要求 ETH/USDT 专属过滤，代码里必须出现明确的 ETH/USDT 分支或等价 pair-specific 条件（例如 metadata['pair'] == 'ETH/USDT' 或 pair 变量判断）。
- 如果 mutation_spec 要求新增指标（ema20、ema50、adx、atr_pct、bollinger_middleband、volume_mean_20 等），必须在 populate_indicators 中实际计算这些 dataframe 列，并在入场条件中引用相关列。
- 避免把入场条件写成几乎永远不触发的苛刻组合。

========== 本次运行开始前 AI 复盘总结：codegen_guidance ==========
内容来自 pre_run_ai_review.json。只作为代码生成参考，必须仍以 mutation_spec 为准，并且必须产生可检测的真实策略结构变化。
{"must_implement": ["stoploss收紧至-0.015~-0.020区间", "trailing_stop=True且trailing_stop_positive=0.005~0.01，trailing_stop_positive_offset=0.015~0.02（仅在盈利后启用）", "对OP/USDT和SOL/USDT增加ATR或波动率相关的入场门槛", "ROI table调整：首档0.012~0.015以更快锁定小利润", "populate_entry_trend中必须有可检测的条件变化"], "avoid_equivalent_code": ["不要生成与nearest_candidate行为等价的策略（仅改名）", "不要生成与上轮v001相同的trend_macd_filtered单一入场标签", "不要复制上轮的pair_filters列表中包含eth/usdt（当前交易对不含ETH）"], "required_detectable_changes": ["stoploss数值必须与nearest_candidate不同", "trailing_stop配置必须新增或修改", "populate_entry_trend中至少有一个新的条件或阈值变化", "entry_tag必须反映实际入场逻辑变化", "minimal_roi至少一个档位数值变化"]}

========== 用户额外代码生成规则 ==========
1. 必须真实落地 mutation_spec。
2. 禁止只改 class name、注释、变量名。
3. 如果新增过滤条件，populate_entry_trend 必须实际出现对应条件。
4. 如果新增指标，populate_indicators 必须实际计算。
5. 如果生成的策略与父策略行为等价，应主动报错，不要输出等价代码。
6. 上一轮如果因为策略重复失败，本轮禁止继续使用同一个 codegen provider，且必须改变 entry_conditions 或 indicators，不允许只改变类名、注释、变量名。
7. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。

v004 strategy.py
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_111202/v004/strategy.py
============================================================
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v004(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.013,
        "25": 0.009,
        "70": 0.005,
        "150": 0.002,
        "240": 0.001,
    }

    stoploss = -0.016

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.006
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.016
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 180

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 8,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 60,
                "trade_limit": 2,
                "stop_duration_candles": 30,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 120,
                "trade_limit": 5,
                "stop_duration_candles": 20,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(dataframe["close"], window=20, stds=2.0)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_mid"] = bollinger["mid"]

        dataframe["bb_width"] = (
            (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_mid"]
        )
        dataframe["bb_width_pct"] = (
            dataframe["bb_width"]
            .rolling(window=120, min_periods=60)
            .rank(method="min", pct=True)
        )

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] = (
            dataframe["atr_pct"]
            .rolling(window=120, min_periods=60)
            .rank(method="min", pct=True)
        )

        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = (
            dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        )

        dataframe["bb_lower_touch"] = dataframe["close"] <= dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_reclaim"] = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["bb_lower"]) &
            (dataframe["close"].shift(1) <= dataframe["bb_lower"].shift(1))
        )
        dataframe["rsi_recover"] = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["rsi_14"], 34)
        dataframe["close_to_mid"] = (
            (dataframe["bb_mid"] - dataframe["close"]) / dataframe["close"]
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        liquidity_filter = (
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 0.80)
        )

        low_vol_base = (
            (dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] < 0.48) &
            (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < 0.55)
        )

        mean_reversion_event = (
            dataframe["bb_reclaim"] &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"].shift(1) < 38) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 46) &
            (dataframe["close"] < dataframe["bb_mid"]) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"] * 0.985) &
            liquidity_filter &
            low_vol_base
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                mean_reversion_event &
                (dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] < 0.42) &
                (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < 0.50) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"] * 0.99)
            )
        elif pair == "OP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                mean_reversion_event &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] < 0.44) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 44)
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                mean_reversion_event &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.020) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] < 0.46) &
                (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < 0.52)
            )
        elif pair == "BNB/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                mean_reversion_event &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"] * 0.99) &
                (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < 0.50)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                mean_reversion_event &
                (dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] < 0.40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 43) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 0.90)
            )
        else:
            long_condition = mean_reversion_event

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "low_vol_mean_reversion",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe


============================================================
v004 codegen.raw.txt
文件：user_data/backtest_results/ai_optimization_runs/run_20260531_111202/v004/codegen.raw.txt
============================================================
from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v004(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.013,
        "25": 0.009,
        "70": 0.005,
        "150": 0.002,
        "240": 0.001,
    }

    stoploss = -0.016

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.006
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.016
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 180

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 8,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 60,
                "trade_limit": 2,
                "stop_duration_candles": 30,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 120,
                "trade_limit": 5,
                "stop_duration_candles": 20,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.012,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(dataframe["close"], window=20, stds=2.0)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_mid"] = bollinger["mid"]

        dataframe["bb_width"] = (
            (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_mid"]
        )
        dataframe["bb_width_pct"] = (
            dataframe["bb_width"]
            .rolling(window=120, min_periods=60)
            .rank(method="min", pct=True)
        )

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] = (
            dataframe["atr_pct"]
            .rolling(window=120, min_periods=60)
            .rank(method="min", pct=True)
        )

        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = (
            dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()
        )

        dataframe["bb_lower_touch"] = dataframe["close"] <= dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_reclaim"] = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["bb_lower"]) &
            (dataframe["close"].shift(1) <= dataframe["bb_lower"].shift(1))
        )
        dataframe["rsi_recover"] = qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["rsi_14"], 34)
        dataframe["close_to_mid"] = (
            (dataframe["bb_mid"] - dataframe["close"]) / dataframe["close"]
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        liquidity_filter = (
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 0.80)
        )

        low_vol_base = (
            (dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] < 0.48) &
            (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < 0.55)
        )

        mean_reversion_event = (
            dataframe["bb_reclaim"] &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"].shift(1) < 38) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 46) &
            (dataframe["close"] < dataframe["bb_mid"]) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"] * 0.985) &
            liquidity_filter &
            low_vol_base
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                mean_reversion_event &
                (dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] < 0.42) &
                (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < 0.50) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"] * 0.99)
            )
        elif pair == "OP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                mean_reversion_event &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] < 0.44) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 44)
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                mean_reversion_event &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] < 0.020) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] < 0.46) &
                (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < 0.52)
            )
        elif pair == "BNB/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                mean_reversion_event &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"] * 0.99) &
                (dataframe["bb_width_pct"] < 0.50)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                mean_reversion_event &
                (dataframe["atr_pct_rank"] < 0.40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 43) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 0.90)
            )
        else:
            long_condition = mean_reversion_event

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "low_vol_mean_reversion",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

{
  "strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v004",
  "strategy_family": "low_volatility_mean_reversion",
  "mutation_type": "reduce_trade_frequency",
  "reason": "低波动均值回归策略族首次尝试。核心假设：在低波动环境中（ATR收缩、BB带宽收窄），价格偏离均值后大概率回归，此时入场胜率高且回撤浅。从historical_best借鉴：champion的winrate高达86%说明精选入场有效，但其MACD单信号导致ETH/BTC亏损；本策略改用BB+RSI均值回归逻辑，仅在价格触及BB下轨且RSI超卖、同时ATR处于低位时入场，天然过滤高波动期的假信号。与之前trend_following/breakout_momentum的区别：不追涨，不追突破，只在低波动收缩期做超卖反弹。选择reduce_trade_frequency是因为均值回归本身就是低频精选逻辑，需要通过ATR百分位+BB带宽双重过滤来确保只在真正低波动期触发，避免高频问题。上轮add_entry_filter/tighten_entry_trigger/adjust_roi均失败，本轮采用完全不同的indicator组合和entry逻辑结构。",

goal={"min_profit_total_pct": 0, "max_drawdown_pct": 3, "min_profit_factor": 0.56, "min_trades": 20, "max_trades": 60, "prefer_exit_signal": false, "max_stoploss_loss_usdt": 15, "ideal_min_trades": 25, "ideal_max_trades": 45}

recent_failed=当前最佳基准：
- profit_total_pct=-0.74
- profit_factor=0.6300
- max_drawdown_pct=1.45
- total_trades=47
最近失败策略摘要：
- v003：交易数172，收益率-2.95%，PF0.51，回撤3.42%，失败=训练区间亏损超过 baseline；Profit factor 低于 baseline；最大回撤超过目标；交易数超过目标上限；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。；high_frequency_failure：交易数超过 max_trades * 2，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']

- v003：交易数51，收益率-0.93%，PF0.50，回撤1.07%，失败=训练区间亏损超过 baseline；Profit factor 低于 baseline；固定止损亏损吞噬 ROI 收益。，avoid_next=['降低高频宽松入场，控制回撤与止损亏损。']

禁止重复：
- 不要生成与失败策略相同的 stoploss / ROI / trailing_stop 组合
- 不要继续生成 300+ 交易的高频策略
- 不要继续宽松 RSI/EMA/momentum 高频结构
- 不要为了满足 min_trades 而过度放宽入场
- 优先减少 stop_loss 损失和验证区间回撤
last_failure=训练区间交易数超过目标上限
必须只选择一个 mutation_type，允许值：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter,adjust_roi,adjust_stoploss,reduce_trade_frequency,disable_or_adjust_trailing,tighten_volume_filter,cooldown_or_protection。
JSON 必须包含: mutation_type,reason,expected_effect,changes,do_not_change。
硬约束：本轮训练区间总交易数目标是 20~60（不是单币种）。低于 16 会直接跳过验证；16~19 会继续验证但仅作候选参考。超过 60 不能成为 best，超过 90 会直接跳过验证。
本次实际使用 5 个交易对。
自动交易数目标：
- 最低交易数：20
- 理想交易数区间：25~45
- 最大交易数：60
以上交易数目标来自 runtime_goal 的最终值，必须覆盖历史经验或旧 prompt 中的固定交易数。
重点：减少固定止损吞噬 ROI，不是增加交易数量。禁止/不推荐：increase_trade_frequency,loosen_entry,enable_trailing,replace_stoploss_with_trailing,adjust_stoploss_only,widen_stoploss。优先：add_entry_filter,tighten_entry_trigger,remove_bad_entry_condition,pair_specific_filter,tag_specific_filter。trailing 规则：禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。

========== 策略结构探索模式 ==========
当前不是微调模式，而是结构探索模式。不要只围绕 current best 做小步改动；请读取 historical_best/nearest/memory 的经验，但允许生成不同结构的策略族。
本轮 mutation_spec 必须包含 strategy_family 字段，且值必须严格等于 planned_strategy_family。
planned_strategy_family=strict_risk_filter
允许的 strategy_family=["trend_following", "pullback_reversal", "breakout_momentum", "low_volatility_mean_reversion", "strict_risk_filter"]
允许重构 entry 条件、indicator 组合、ROI 逻辑、exit 逻辑。
必须保留 Freqtrade IStrategy 策略格式、现货 long-only、不做空、不杠杆、不马丁格尔、不外部 API、use_exit_signal=False 等风控安全边界。
探索模式交易数硬约束：本次交易数目标 min_trades=20，ideal_min_trades=25，ideal_max_trades=45，max_trades=60。任何 strategy_family 生成的入场逻辑都必须围绕 25~45 笔设计；禁止生成明显高频策略；如果预计交易数会超过 60，不要输出该方案。
如果当前 family 统计中 pending_low_trade_profitable_near_miss=true 或 last_low_trade_near_miss 非空，下一轮必须优先轻微放宽该 near-miss 的入场条件，把交易数提升到 20~25，不要直接跳到完全不同 family。
breakout_momentum 和 strict_risk_filter 对频率错误更敏感：如果它们曾明显超出 max_trades，必须显著收紧触发事件、冷却、成交量/趋势过滤，避免再次高频。
trailing 限制：不要建议 replace_stoploss_with_trailing；禁止完全用 trailing 替代固定止损；trailing 只能在盈利达到 positive offset 后启用；当前重点不是用 trailing 替代 stoploss，而是减少低质量入场和控制亏损单数量。
避免连续生成同类策略；每个 family 至少尝试一次；明显连续亏损或连续 high_frequency_failure 的 family 会被降低权重或本 run 禁选。
请在 reason 中说明该 family 的结构假设、从历史 best 中借鉴了什么、与小步微调有何不同。

========== 用户额外策略顾问规则 ==========
1. 当前固定使用 BTC/USDT、OP/USDT、SOL/USDT、BNB/USDT、DOGE/USDT 五个交易对。
2. 不要简单用 trailing 替代 fixed stoploss。trailing 只能在已有盈利后启用，不能让移动止损成为主要亏损来源。
3. 当前核心目标是减少低质量入场和亏损单数量，不是盲目提高交易频率。
4. 如果某个 family 连续产生高频亏损，应降低该 family 权重。
5. 保持目标交易数 20~60，理想区间 25~45。不要低于 20，也不要高于 60。

已失败 mutation_type（避免重复）=['add_entry_filter', 'adjust_roi', 'reduce_trade_frequency', 'tighten_entry_trigger']

from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_014140_v001(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.025,
        "15": 0.018,
        "35": 0.012,
        "60": 0.007,
        "120": 0.004,
    }

    stoploss = -0.035

    trailing_stop = False
    # trailing_stop_positive = 0.008
    # trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.014
    # trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 4,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 72,
                "trade_limit": 6,
                "stop_duration_candles": 12,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 1,
                "stop_duration_candles": 24,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_12"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=12)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_26"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=26)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)
        dataframe["ema_200"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=200)
        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        macd = ta.MACD(dataframe, fastperiod=12, slowperiod=26, signalperiod=9)
        dataframe["macd"] = macd["macd"]
        dataframe["macd_signal"] = macd["macdsignal"]
        dataframe["macd_histogram"] = macd["macdhist"]

        dataframe["volume_mean_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_lower"]
        dataframe["bb_width_mean_20"] = dataframe["bb_width"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["macd_hist_rising"] = (
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1)) &
            (dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1) > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(2))
        )

        dataframe["bb_pctb"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"])

        dataframe["atr"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_sma"] = dataframe["atr"].rolling(window=20).mean()
        dataframe["atr_ratio"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["atr_sma"]
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr"] / dataframe["close"]

        dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]
        dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] = dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        # New indicator: EMA 20 slope (percentage change over 3 candles)
        dataframe["ema_slope"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3) * 100
        )

        # New indicators required by mutation_spec
        dataframe["atr_norm"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14) / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["ema50_slope"] = (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(3)

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        atr_filter = (dataframe["atr_ratio"] < 1.3)

        macd_momentum = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
            (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 72) &
            (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 1.0) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            atr_filter
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02) &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &      # Added: price above EMA200
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"])       # Added: EMA50 above EMA200
            )
        elif pair == "ETH/USDT":
            eth_trend_alignment_filter = (
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"])
            )
            eth_macd_quality_filter = (
                (dataframe["macd"] > dataframe["macd_signal"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > 0) &
                (dataframe["macd_histogram"] > dataframe["macd_histogram"].shift(1))
            )
            eth_rsi_filter = (
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65)
            )
            eth_volume_confirmation_filter = (
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 1.05)
            )

            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_100"]) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (
                    (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) |
                    (dataframe["ema_50_slope_3"] > 0)
                ) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 22) &                           # Changed from 28 to 22 per mutation spec
                (dataframe["close_ema20_pct"] < 0.018) &
                (dataframe["atr_pct"] <= 0.018) &
                eth_trend_alignment_filter &
                eth_macd_quality_filter &
                eth_rsi_filter &
                eth_volume_confirmation_filter &
                (dataframe["atr_norm"] < 0.012) &
                (dataframe["ema50_slope"] > -0.001)
            )
        elif pair == "XRP/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 25) &
                (dataframe["ema_slope"] > 0.02)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                macd_momentum &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 26) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 58) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["macd_hist_rising"])
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            long_condition = (
                (dataframe["ema_50"] > dataframe["ema_200"]) &
                (dataframe["ema_12"] > dataframe["ema_26"]) &
                (qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["macd_histogram"], 0)) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 74) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &                            # Changed from 17 to 18 per mutation spec
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_mean_20"] * 0.9) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
                atr_filter
            )
        else:
            long_condition = macd_momentum

        if long_condition is not None:
            dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
                1,
                "macd_cross_momentum",
            )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v005(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.015,
        "25": 0.010,
        "60": 0.006,
        "120": 0.003,
        "240": 0.001,
    }

    stoploss = -0.018

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.007
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.018
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 10,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 2,
                "stop_duration_candles": 36,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 100,
                "trade_limit": 4,
                "stop_duration_candles": 30,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_8"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=8)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["atr_pct_sma_50"] = dataframe["atr_pct"].rolling(window=50, min_periods=50).mean()
        dataframe["atr_expansion"] = dataframe["atr_pct"] / dataframe["atr_pct_sma_50"]

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["ema20_slope_3"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)
        )
        dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)
        )

        dataframe["close_to_ema20"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = bollinger["mid"]
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]

        dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] = (
            dataframe["atr_pct"]
            .rolling(window=100, min_periods=50)
            .apply(lambda x: (x <= x[-1]).sum() / len(x) * 100.0, raw=True)
        )

        dataframe["recent_pullback"] = (
            (dataframe["low"].rolling(window=8, min_periods=8).min() < dataframe["ema_20"] * 0.995)
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        reclaim_event = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_20"]) &
            (dataframe["recent_pullback"])
        )

        rsi_recovery_event = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["rsi_14"], 45) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"])
        )

        entry_event = reclaim_event | rsi_recovery_event

        base_quality = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 35) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.10) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 70) &
            (dataframe["atr_expansion"] < 1.35) &
            (dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] > -0.0015)
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 60) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
                (dataframe["close_to_ema20"] < 0.012)
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 55) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 20) &
                (dataframe["ema20_slope_3"] > 0)
            )
        elif pair == "OP/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 55) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 19) &
                (dataframe["close_to_ema20"] < 0.015) &
                (dataframe["atr_expansion"] < 1.20)
            )
        elif pair == "BNB/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 75) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 37) &
                (dataframe["close_to_ema20"] < 0.018)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 65) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.30) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 39) &
                (dataframe["close_to_ema20"] < 0.020)
            )
        else:
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 65) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38)
            )

        long_condition = base_quality & pair_filter & entry_event

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "strict_risk_entry",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

from freqtrade.strategy import IStrategy
from pandas import DataFrame
import talib.abstract as ta
from freqtrade.vendor.qtpylib import indicators as qtpylib


class MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v005(IStrategy):
    INTERFACE_VERSION = 3

    timeframe = "5m"
    can_short = False

    minimal_roi = {
        "0": 0.015,
        "25": 0.010,
        "60": 0.006,
        "120": 0.003,
        "240": 0.001,
    }

    stoploss = -0.018

    trailing_stop = True
    trailing_stop_positive = 0.007
    trailing_stop_positive_offset = 0.018
    trailing_only_offset_is_reached = True

    use_exit_signal = False
    exit_profit_only = False
    ignore_roi_if_entry_signal = False

    process_only_new_candles = True
    startup_candle_count = 220

    @property
    def protections(self):
        return [
            {
                "method": "CooldownPeriod",
                "stop_duration_candles": 10,
            },
            {
                "method": "StoplossGuard",
                "lookback_period_candles": 48,
                "trade_limit": 2,
                "stop_duration_candles": 36,
                "only_per_pair": True,
            },
            {
                "method": "MaxDrawdown",
                "lookback_period_candles": 100,
                "trade_limit": 4,
                "stop_duration_candles": 30,
                "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.01,
            },
        ]

    def populate_indicators(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["ema_8"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=8)
        dataframe["ema_20"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=20)
        dataframe["ema_50"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=50)
        dataframe["ema_100"] = ta.EMA(dataframe, timeperiod=100)

        dataframe["rsi_14"] = ta.RSI(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["adx"] = ta.ADX(dataframe, timeperiod=14)

        dataframe["atr_14"] = ta.ATR(dataframe, timeperiod=14)
        dataframe["atr_pct"] = dataframe["atr_14"] / dataframe["close"]
        dataframe["atr_pct_sma_50"] = dataframe["atr_pct"].rolling(window=50, min_periods=50).mean()
        dataframe["atr_expansion"] = dataframe["atr_pct"] / dataframe["atr_pct_sma_50"]

        dataframe["volume_sma_20"] = dataframe["volume"].rolling(window=20, min_periods=20).mean()

        dataframe["ema20_slope_3"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_20"] - dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)) / dataframe["ema_20"].shift(3)
        )
        dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] = (
            (dataframe["ema_50"] - dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)) / dataframe["ema_50"].shift(5)
        )

        dataframe["close_to_ema20"] = (dataframe["close"] - dataframe["ema_20"]) / dataframe["ema_20"]

        bollinger = qtpylib.bollinger_bands(qtpylib.typical_price(dataframe), window=20, stds=2)
        dataframe["bb_lower"] = bollinger["lower"]
        dataframe["bb_middle"] = bollinger["mid"]
        dataframe["bb_upper"] = bollinger["upper"]
        dataframe["bb_width"] = (dataframe["bb_upper"] - dataframe["bb_lower"]) / dataframe["bb_middle"]

        dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] = (
            dataframe["atr_pct"]
            .rolling(window=100, min_periods=50)
            .apply(lambda x: (x <= x[-1]).sum() / len(x) * 100.0, raw=True)
        )

        dataframe["recent_pullback"] = (
            (dataframe["low"].rolling(window=8, min_periods=8).min() < dataframe["ema_20"] * 0.995)
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_entry_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["enter_long"] = 0
        dataframe["enter_tag"] = ""

        pair = metadata.get("pair", "")

        reclaim_event = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["close"], dataframe["ema_20"]) &
            (dataframe["recent_pullback"])
        )

        rsi_recovery_event = (
            qtpylib.crossed_above(dataframe["rsi_14"], 45) &
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"])
        )

        entry_event = reclaim_event | rsi_recovery_event

        base_quality = (
            (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["ema_20"] > dataframe["ema_50"]) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 35) &
            (dataframe["rsi_14"] < 65) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.10) &
            (dataframe["volume"] > 0) &
            (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 70) &
            (dataframe["atr_expansion"] < 1.35) &
            (dataframe["ema50_slope_5"] > -0.0015)
        )

        if pair == "BTC/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 60) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 40) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 18) &
                (dataframe["close_to_ema20"] < 0.012)
            )
        elif pair == "SOL/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 55) &
                (dataframe["close"] > dataframe["ema_20"]) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 20) &
                (dataframe["ema20_slope_3"] > 0)
            )
        elif pair == "OP/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 55) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38) &
                (dataframe["adx"] > 19) &
                (dataframe["close_to_ema20"] < 0.015) &
                (dataframe["atr_expansion"] < 1.20)
            )
        elif pair == "BNB/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 75) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 37) &
                (dataframe["close_to_ema20"] < 0.018)
            )
        elif pair == "DOGE/USDT":
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 65) &
                (dataframe["volume"] > dataframe["volume_sma_20"] * 1.30) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 39) &
                (dataframe["close_to_ema20"] < 0.020)
            )
        else:
            pair_filter = (
                (dataframe["atr_percentile_100"] < 65) &
                (dataframe["rsi_14"] > 38)
            )

        long_condition = base_quality & pair_filter & entry_event

        dataframe.loc[long_condition, ["enter_long", "enter_tag"]] = (
            1,
            "strict_risk_entry",
        )

        return dataframe

    def populate_exit_trend(self, dataframe: DataFrame, metadata: dict) -> DataFrame:
        dataframe["exit_long"] = 0
        return dataframe

{
  "strategy_name": "MultiCoin_AI_Strategy_20260531_111202_v005",
  "strategy_family": "strict_risk_filter",
  "mutation_type": "pair_specific_filter",
  "reason": "strict_risk_filter family 尚未尝试，结构假设：核心问题是固定止损吞噬ROI收益（所有失败版本stop_loss_profit_abs远超roi_profit_abs），根因是入场时机不精准导致价格深度回撤触发止损。本轮采用pair_specific_filter：针对不同币种波动率特征设置差异化入场门槛和ATR动态质量过滤。借鉴historical_best（36笔PF=0.93，XRP/DOGE高胜率但BTC/ETH拖累）和nearest_candidate（feb验证PF=1.47），核心改进：1)用ATR百分位过滤高波动环境下的入场（减少止损触发概率）；2)对BTC/SOL等波动大的币种要求更强趋势确认；3)收紧stoploss至-1.8%减少单笔亏损；4)ROI首档提前锁利。与之前微调不同：这是全新entry结构，不基于MACD单一信号，而是EMA趋势+RSI超卖+ATR波动率三重过滤，且按币种差异化阈值。",
  "session_parent_reason": "本轮选择pair_specific_filter因为：1)已失败的mutation_type包括add_entry_filter/tighten_entry_trigger/adjust_roi/reduce_trade_frequency，pair_specific_filter未尝试；2)历史数据显示OP/SOL/BTC是主要亏损来源（PF<0.5），而BNB相对稳定，需要差异化处理；3)strict_risk_filter family权重1.0且从未生成过，是本轮强制family。",
  "expected_effect": "预期交易数30~45笔（5币种各6~9笔），通过ATR波动率过滤排除高波动环境入场，减少止损触发次数从16次降至5~8次，stop_loss_profit_abs控制在8以内，PF提升至0.8+，回撤控制在1.5%以内。",
  "changes": {
    "indicators": ["ema_20", "ema_50", "rsi_14", "atr_14", "atr_percentile_100（ATR在最近100根K线的百分位）", "volume_sma_20"],
    "entry_logic": {
      "base_conditions": [
        "close > ema_50（趋势向上）",
        "ema_20 > ema_50（短期均线在长期之上）",
        "rsi_14 > 35 and rsi_14 < 65（避免超买超卖极端区域入场）",
        "volume > volume_sma_20 * 1.1（成交量确认）",
        "atr_percentile_100 < 70（排除高波动环境，核心风控过滤）"
      ],
      "pair_specific_thresholds": {
        "BTC/USDT": "atr_percentile < 60 且 rsi > 40（BTC波动大，更严格）",
        "SOL/USDT": "atr_percentile < 55 且 close > ema_20（SOL需更强趋势确认）",
        "OP/USDT": "atr_percentile < 55 且 rsi > 38（OP历史PF最低，最严格过滤）",
        "BNB/USDT": "atr_percentile < 75（BNB相对稳定，适度放宽）",
        "DOGE/USDT": "atr_percentile < 65 且 volume > volume_sma_20 * 1.3（DOGE需更强量能确认）"
      },
      "entry_tag": "strict_risk_entry"
    },
    "minimal_roi": {

    "protections": [

      {"method": "MaxDrawdown", "lookback_period_candles": 100, "trade_limit": 4, "stop_duration_candles": 30, "max_allowed_drawdown": 0.010}
    ]
  },
  "do_not_change": [
    "use_exit_signal必须为False",
    "现货long-only，不做空不杠杆",
    "IStrategy格式",
    "5个交易对：BTC/USDT, OP/USDT, SOL/USDT, BNB/USDT, DOGE/USDT",
    "trailing_stop不能替代固定stoploss，只在盈利offset后启用",
    "不使用外部API",
    "不使用马丁格尔"
  ]
}
